mapper.select: SELECT staff_id, user_id, name, gender, birth_date, origin, id_card, avatar, resume, bio, work_experience_text, professional_skills, work_experience, hourly_rate, rating, work_status, verification_status, create_time, update_time FROM staff WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}

SELECT staff_id, user_id, name, gender, birth_date, origin, id_card, avatar, resume, bio, work_experience_text, professional_skills, work_experience, hourly_rate, rating, work_status, verification_status, create_time, update_time FROM staff WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT s.staff_id, s.user_id, s.name, s.gender, s.birth_date, s.origin, s.id_card, s.avatar, s.resume, s.bio, s.work_experience_text, s.professional_skills, s.work_experience, s.hourly_rate, s.rating, s.work_status, s.verification_status, s.create_time, s.update_time, u.phone, u.email FROM staff s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE s.staff_id = #{staffId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff (user_id, name, gender, birth_date, origin, id_card, avatar, resume, bio, work_experience_text, professional_skills, work_experience, hourly_rate, rating, work_status, verification_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{origin}, #{idCard}, #{avatar}, #{resume}, #{bio}, #{workExperienceText}, #{professionalSkills}, #{workExperience}, #{hourlyRate}, #{rating}, #{workStatus}, #{verificationStatus})
